items.title: Business jet demand soars in Asia
items.desc: Amid commercial flight disruptions caused the Mideast war, business jet usage is booming in Thailand and Southeast Asia, with plane manufacturers marketing their latest models of long‑range aircraft to wealthy individuals seeking to expand their businesses internationally.

items.title: Customs rule change trims parcel imports
items.desc: Imported parcels delivered directly to recipients in Thailand have decreased in volume, while their prices have increased as a result of Customs Department measures.

items.title: Bangchak, OR resume B20 sales to reduce fuel costs
items.desc: Two SET-listed energy firms, Bangchak Corporation and PTT Oil and Retail Business (OR), have resumed commercial sales of B20 biodiesel after nearly four years as Thai authorities intensify efforts to diversify energy sources and reduce reliance on imported oil.

items.title: Traders advise Bitcoin bounce may constitute a 'bull trap'
items.desc: Investors are advised to exercise caution with Bitcoin, as analysts warn a sharp price rebound amid escalating geopolitical tensions may be driven more by short-term market dynamics than by a sustainable shift in fundamentals.

items.title: Push for electric bus upgrade by 2029
items.desc: Caretaker transport minister Phiphat Ratchakitprakarn is stepping up efforts to switch all diesel-powered interprovincial buses in Bangkok to electric buses during the Anutin Charnvirakul administration to save on oil expenses.

items.title: Energy wake-up call
items.desc: Business leaders are calling for the government to study long-term energy security strategies to reduce reliance on imported energy and expand access to renewable sources in the wake of the ongoing crisis stemming from war in the Middle East.

items.title: Khon Kaen locals convert plastic waste into fuel
items.desc: Local authorities in Khon Kaen have launched a pilot initiative to convert plastic waste into fuel, aiming to help communities reduce fuel expenses amid soaring petrol prices.

items.title: DSI drops Phra Dhammajayo case
items.desc: The case against Phra Dhammajayo has been terminated after exceeding the 10-year statute of limitations, bringing an end to long-running proceedings without a trial.

items.title: DSI clarifies stance on case of missing ex-abbot
items.desc: The Department of Special Investigation (DSI) clarified its handling of the case involving Phra Dhammajayo, former abbot of Wat Phra Dhammakaya, following a decision by prosecutors to scrap it after the statute of limitations expired.

items.title: Lawmakers to meet over House benefits
items.desc: Lawmakers will meet on Monday to debate scrapping free meals for MPs following criticism over excessive taxpayer-funded benefits.

items.title: Experts slam sharp surge in fuel price
items.desc: Energy experts have raised concerns over the recent sharp fuel price increase, warning that it could worsen hardship, open the door to profiteering, before urging the government to implement reforms.

items.title: Pheu Thai on the outer
items.desc: The allocation of cabinet quotas has unsettled Pheu Thai Party, exposing internal tensions while raising questions over its electoral recovery.

items.title: Ministry unveils cost-of-living help
items.desc: The Commerce Ministry has unveiled a broad package of cost-of-living relief measures, including discounts of up to 50% on consumer goods from April 1, tighter oversight of fertiliser prices, and accelerated efforts to reduce farmers' production costs.

items.title: Fuel 'sufficient' as holiday nears
items.desc: The government has confirmed there are sufficient fuel supplies to meet demand during the upcoming Songkran holiday, as authorities intensify nationwide distribution and monitoring efforts to ease public concerns over possible shortages.

items.title: New chopper pad for Koh Chang
items.desc: A new helicopter pad for emergency patient transport has opened on Koh Chang in Trat, boosting the island's medical readiness and enhancing tourist safety.

items.title: 3 bantengs released into the wild
items.desc: Three bantengs were released into Salak Phra Wildlife Sanctuary's Khao Suea unit in Kanchanaburi's Muang district, to increase its population in the wild.

items.title: Govt urges Iran to let Thai ships pass
items.desc: The government is working closely with Iran to ensure the safe passage of Thai vessels through the Strait of Hormuz, said Panidone Pachimsawat, deputy spokesman for the Ministry of Foreign Affairs.

items.title: Hong Kong Art Toy Story returns to CentralWorld
items.desc: Following last year's huge success which saw a rapid sold-out phenomenon, the Hong Kong Art Toy Story makes a grand comeback as a premier highlight of Thailand Toy Expo 2026 at Eden Zone, 1st floor of CentralWorld, from Thursday to Sunday.

items.title: Agents of change
items.desc: In The Shipper (2020), Pan and Soda enjoy pairing young men in yaoi fiction, especially two popular students Kim and Way. Following a bike accident, the grim reaper puts Pan's and Kim's soul in the wrong bodies. Pan recovers in his, while Kim remains unconscious in hers. As the god of death is looking for a solution, Pan must navigate life in her senior's body, giving her opportunities to make...

items.title: Iberian food, culture await you at  The Slate Phuket's 'Bold Espana'
items.desc: Known for creating out-of-the-ordinary experiences, The Slate Phuket hotel is holding "Bold Espana" to ignite the senses on Friday at 6.30pm.

items.title: Immigration warns of scam digital arrival card websites
items.desc: The  Immigration Bureau has warned foreign travellers against fraudulent websites offering Thailand Digital Arrival Card (TDAC) services for a fee, stressing that registration, while mandatory, is free and available only through official channels.

items.title: PM makes surprise visit to Isan petrol station
items.desc: NAKHON PHANOM - Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul made a surprise visit to this northeastern border province on Sunday, stopping to top up his rented car at a petrol pump and reaffirming there will be adequate fuel for travellers during next month's Songkran festival.

items.title: Surin checkpoint stop exposes drink-driving monk in disguise
items.desc: Surin checkpoint stop exposes drink-driving monk in disguise Legacy A drunk monk was arrested at a checkpoint in Surin early on March 27 after police said he was disguised in a wig while driving in a pickup, with a woman passenger and a handgun later found during a search. The pickup truck was stopped at about 12.05am on Krung Si Nok Road in Mueang Surin. Officers reported the driver initially gave details that did not match their preliminary checks and also showed signs of intoxication. The driver was later identified as 42 year old Suphawat. A breath test reportedly showed an alcohol level a

items.title: Disney ends OpenAI tie-up after Sora shutdown
items.desc: Disney has ended its partnership with OpenAI following the decision to discontinue Sora, a popular AI video-generation application, marking a sudden shift in strategy for both firms.

items.title: Kanchanaburi sting nets two Myanmar suspects in prostitution case
items.desc: Kanchanaburi sting nets two Myanmar suspects in prostitution case Legacy Police in Kanchanaburi arrested two Myanmar men on March 27, after an undercover sting targeting a prostitution arrangement network in a border area, with a 15 year old identified as a human trafficking victim . The investigation began after police received information that a group of Myanmar youths were allegedly bringing women across the border for prostitution in Nong Lu, Sangkhla Buri. The contact channel was reportedly a Line account used by a broker known as Jaychin. Officers posed as tourists and arranged to purcha

items.title: Bridge linking Lumpini and Benchakitti park set to open on May 1
items.desc: Bridge linking Lumpini and Benchakitti park set to open on May 1 Legacy Bangkok runners and walkers will soon be able to travel between Lumpini Park and Benchakitti Park via the Lumpini Green Bridge. The Bangkok Metropolitan Administration (BMA) officials are expecting an informal opening on May 1 . Deputy Bangkok governor Chakkapan Phewngam visited the project site in Pathum Wan district to follow up on work overseen by the Environment Department. He was joined by the department director, executives, staff and the contractor, who provided updates. Photo via BMA The BMA said the Environment De

items.title: 赴泰成本要涨？泰国拟向外国游客收费300泰铢
items.desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 3月29日，据泰媒报道，泰国副总理兼交通部长皮帕表示，新一届政府计划推进向外国游客征收入境旅游费，标准为每人300泰铢。该政策已被纳入即将向国会提交的施政纲领，并准备在首次内阁会议上审议，一旦通过将立即启动实施。 根据最新方案，该费用将仅针对通过航空入境的外国游客收取，每人每次300泰铢。而通过陆路和水路入境的游客将免于缴纳。此前曾提出陆路和水路游客需缴纳每人150泰铢，但由于此类旅客多为当日往返或短期停留，政府最终决定予以豁免。 该旅游费政策早在2023年2月14日已获内阁会议原则通过，并规划设立专项基金，用于支持旅游业发展，包括提升旅游基础设施、改善公共服务、减轻政府在游客安全事故中的财政负担，以及为外国游客提供保险保障。皮帕表示，目前相关方案已基本准备就绪，只需再次提交内阁审议即可推进实施。 根据既定规划，旅游费收入将主要用于维护和修复因旅游活动而受损的旅游资源与自然环境，提升基础设施建设，增强旅游业整体竞争力。此外，政府还计划设立“泰国旅游促进基金”，用于行业管理能力提升、市场推广、资源保护及旅游目的地管理等方面，进一步推动泰国旅游业可持续发展。 （编译：Juliette；审校：WAN；来源：prachachat） The post 赴泰成本要涨？泰国拟向外国游客收费300泰铢 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .

items.title: Thailand PM apologises for fuel issues, lifts price caps
items.desc: Thailand PM apologises for fuel issues, lifts price caps Legacy Thailand’s prime minister has apologised for the country’s fuel management issues, blaming prolonged disruptions on the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. Anutin Charnvirakul said the decision to end fuel price caps was taken to curb oil smuggling and ease shortages. Speaking at a press conference at Government House in Bangkok on Saturday, Anutin addressed the situation following a month of conflict in the Middle East. He explained that the government ceased its costly price-capping efforts, resulting in a six-baht

items.title: Motorway shooting probed after body found in Nakhon Ratchasima
items.desc: Motorway shooting probed after body found in Nakhon Ratchasima Legacy A man was found dead on the shoulder of the M6 motorway in Sung Noen district, Nakhon Ratchasima, late last night, March 28, with police treating the case as a shooting while they work to identify the suspect. Highway Police from Station 3, Sub-division 8, Highway Police Division were alerted at about 8pm after a tow-truck driver reported a man lying by the roadside on the inbound carriageway towards Nakhon Ratchasima . Officers arrived to find the 30 year old man lying near the guardrail on the hard shoulder. He was reporte

items.title: 海尔重金押注泰国市场！12亿投资布局智能家居新赛道
items.desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 3月29日，据泰媒报道，海尔电器（泰国）宣布将在2026年投入超过12亿泰铢，加速业务扩张并推动品牌向全球化升级，重点布局销售渠道、技术创新和智能家居产品结构。这一投资计划反映出泰国家电市场正从基础功能向智能化、节能化、全屋互联方向加速转型。 海尔电器（泰国）有限公司总经理董建平表示，2025年虽面临经济压力和消费能力尚未完全恢复的挑战，但消费者行为的变化——尤其是对AI技术和健康功能产品的需求显著上升——成为公司逆势增长的重要动力。2025年公司总营收达到112.3亿泰铢，市场份额为14%。其中空调仍是核心业务，实现收入46亿泰铢，销量位居第一。其他品类同样表现亮眼：冰箱收入22亿泰铢，同比增长39%；洗衣机15.4亿泰铢，同比增长23%；冷柜11亿泰铢，同比增长23%；电视7.6亿泰铢，同比增长51%；热水器增长高达52%。这些数据表明，市场并非全面萎缩，而是正在向高附加值产品转移。 2026年，公司目标营收为140亿泰铢，同比增长25%。核心战略包括：扩大销售网络，计划将12亿泰铢投资用于增加经销商网点、现代零售渠道及线上平台建设；提升高端产品占比，推出超过50款围绕“AI智慧生活”理念的新产品，实现空调、冰箱、洗衣机、电视等产品的互联互通；在商用领域加大拓展力度，尤其是商用空调业务，预计增长40%，以顺应服务业和房地产市场的复苏趋势。 董建平指出，泰国仍是

items.title: SMEs’ loan access to improve
items.desc: The government has launched a scheme to help small and medium-sized businesses access financing for commercial pickup trucks, targeting transport operators, farmers and freelancers.

items.title: 赴泰旅客注意：泰国数字入境卡免费申请，这些收费网站是假的！
items.desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 3月29日，泰国移民局发布紧急提醒，外国人填写泰国数字入境卡（TDAC）为免费服务，无需支付任何费用。移民局同时揭露多家假冒网站以代办为名向旅客收取费用，提醒旅客务必通过官方渠道登记。 根据规定，所有入境泰国的外国人必须提前在TDAC系统中登记信息，以便在入境前完成筛查。这一制度类似于韩国的K-ETA、日本的Visit Japan以及新加坡的SG Arrival Card。泰国自2025年5月1日起已正式实施该系统。 泰国移民局副局长兼发言人清隆警少将指出，近期发现有不少外国人误在假冒TDAC平台上注册，这些平台并非官方系统。他强调，外国人必须通过官方网站tdac.immigration.go.th进行登记，或通过immigration.go.th进入相关链接、扫描二维码填写信息。建议旅客至少提前3天在线注册，以便移民局完成系统审核，并通过电子邮件反馈结果，从而避免在入境时长时间排队。整个注册过程完全免费，不收取任何费用。 然而，调查发现，仍有超过10%的外国旅客误在假网站上注册，这些网站不仅不与移民局系统连接，还向用户收取费用。目前被列入可疑或收费网站名单的域名包括：tdac.info、ivisa.com、thailandarrivalcardtourist.com、thailandarrivalcard2025.com、thailandonarrivalweb

items.title: Two women injured after shooting near Pattaya Music Festival site
items.desc: Two women injured after shooting near Pattaya Music Festival site Legacy Two women were seriously injured in a shooting near the Pattaya Music Festival 2026 event site in Bang Lamung, Chon Buri, late on March 27, before police arrested a suspect and seized a 9mm pistol . Police were notified at 10.46pm of shots fired near a restaurant on Na Kluea Road, close to Lan Pho Market in Na Kluea. Tourists in the area were reportedly panicking as officers arrived to secure the scene. Photo via Siam Chon News Police found 29 year old Sutisa, who was shot in the abdomen and reported to be in critical con

items.title: 200泰铢买快速通关？普吉机场排队长龙引发质疑
items.desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 据泰媒报道，3月28日，普吉国际机场出境移民检查区域出现严重排队现象，大量外国游客长时间滞留，部分旅客险些误机。事件引发社交媒体广泛关注，“付费快速通道”的传闻更成为舆论焦点。 根据“普吉信息中心”页面发布的现场照片显示，出境通道前旅客密集聚集，排队队伍绵延漫长。有网友发文指出，不少游客等待时间较长，并对所谓“付费快速通道”提出质疑。有说法称，部分游客被收取约每人200泰铢费用，以换取更快通过移民检查。不过，该说法目前尚未得到官方确认，相关情况仍在核查之中。 报道指出，该事件发生在周末出行高峰期，大量旅客集中离境，导致移民检查区域严重拥堵。部分旅客等待时间过长，甚至有乘客险些误机，最终需要航空公司地面工作人员在现场协助，将旅客从队伍前方带离，确保其能够及时登机。与此同时，有现场人员及社交媒体用户反映，在客流量激增的情况下，部分检查通道未全部开放，导致旅客疏导效率下降，进一步加剧拥堵问题。 最新消息显示，已有民众就此事向普吉府第2选区议员反映，希望将相关问题提交至众议院及国会旅游委员会进行讨论，以尽快查明事实并提出改进措施。在相关帖子传播后，大量网民参与讨论。有评论称，应深入了解一线工作人员和直接接触游客的人员反馈，认为类似情况并非首次出现；也有网友表示曾从游客口中听说类似现象；还有声音批评问题长期未得到改善。 目前，关于“付费快速通道”的说法仍有待相关部门进一步调

items.title: 泰国总理阿努廷亲临比亚迪展台 双品牌四车型阵容闪耀曼谷车展
items.desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 3月28日，曼谷——正在举行的第47届曼谷国际汽车展迎来重要时刻。泰国总理阿努廷·参威拉军亲临比亚迪泰国展台，比亚迪（泰国）有限公司总经理柯育滨携管理团队热情接待。 作为比亚迪海狮07纯电动车的实际使用者与车主，阿努廷总理此番到访显得格外亲切。在参观过程中，总理详细听取了比亚迪在泰业务进展、生产基地扩张及品牌发展方向等方面的汇报，并就电动汽车创新理念与团队进行了深入交流。阿努廷总理对比亚迪的运营成果表示满意与赞赏，并对比亚迪在推动泰国迈向低碳社会中所发挥的重要作用充满信心。 比亚迪泰国分公司总经理柯育滨（右）向泰国总理阿努廷·参威拉军（左）介绍比亚迪在泰情况 此次总理的莅临让比亚迪泰国团队备受鼓舞。柯育滨表示，总理作为比亚迪车主亲临展台，是对比亚迪泰国团队最大的肯定，未来比亚迪将继续深耕泰国市场，以创新推动泰国汽车产业发展。 泰国总理阿努廷·参威拉军（左）与比亚迪泰国分公司总经理柯育滨（右）亲切交流沟通 值得关注的是，本届曼谷车展于当地时间3月23日开幕，比亚迪携主品牌BYD与新豪华品牌腾势（DENZA）双品牌联合亮相，展台面积达2835平方米，现场集结超40辆新能源汽车，四款全新车型同步首发，成为本届车展的核心焦点之一。在“Thailand Car of the Year 2026”评选中，比亚迪与腾势共有8款车型荣获奖项，覆盖纯电动与插电式混合动力多个细分领域

items.title: Songkran festival to boost Thailand’s economy with 30 billion baht
items.desc: Songkran festival to boost Thailand’s economy with 30 billion baht Legacy Thailand’s Songkran Festival Expected to Generate Over 30 Billion Baht This April Thailand’s Songkran festival is set to draw hundreds of thousands of tourists and generate over 30 billion baht in economic circulation this April, with celebrations running from April 11 to 15. The Tourism Authority of Thailand (TAT) projects a 6% increase in revenue compared to last year. Despite concerns that an ongoing energy crisis may be dampening growth, TAT governor Thapanee Kiatphaibool said she remains optimistic

items.title: Long queues at Phuket Airport raise ‘special paid lane’ questions
items.desc: Long queues at Phuket Airport raise ‘special paid lane’ questions Legacy Claims of a “special paid lane” at outbound immigration in Phuket have circulated online after photos showed long queues at Phuket International Airport over the weekend, according to reports yesterday, March 28. Images shared from the Phuket Info Centre page showed large numbers of tourists queuing at the Immigration Bureau checkpoint on the international departures side. The images prompted widespread discussion on social media. In its post, the page said many tourists appeared to face lengthy waits and questioned alleg

items.title: 从弃后到封后，泰国知名歌手夺下选美冠军！曾献唱官方宣传中文MV
items.desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 3月28日，2026年泰国万国小姐大赛隆重举行。凭借坚定的意志、顽强的毅力以及灵活应变的能力，来自春武里府的佳丽、乡村歌手小宁·帕塔玛·吉特萨瓦（Ning Pattama Jitsawat）一路在人气票选中高歌猛进，最终脱颖而出，成功摘得桂冠。她将于今年10月底代表泰国前往印度，参加2026年万国小姐大赛。 本次冠军所得奖励包括：价值120万泰铢的“The Evolution”皇冠、150万泰铢现金、一套价值180万泰铢的公寓住宅，以及多项特别奖励。此外，小宁还一举斩获最佳销售奖、媒体摄影师最喜爱佳丽奖以及Browit by Nongchat Influencer奖等多项特别奖项。 其他获奖佳丽名单如下： 亚军：武里南府佳丽 安杰莉卡·帕纳萨娅·安杰莉卡·迪马克（Angelika Panatsaya Angelika Dimak） 季军：普吉府佳丽 艾琳·艾琳·纳布苏（Ailin Ailin Naepsuk） 第四名：沙拉武里府佳丽 帕佩尔·纳塔克丽塔·格德甘吉罗（Phaphae Nattakrita Koetkaenjiroj） 第五名：素可泰府佳丽 娜丽蒙·差林勒（Narumon Chalermrerk） 作为新晋加冕的2026年泰国万国小姐冠军，她凭借无可争议的实力登上巅峰。从曾经活跃在荧屏上的乡村女歌手，到如今站上选美舞台的最高领奖台，小宁用行动证明，自己

items.title: Thai authorities target fake local businesses in Krabi tourism sector
items.desc: Thai authorities target fake local businesses in Krabi tourism sector Legacy Thailand’s Department of Business Development has stepped up its crackdown on nominee businesses in Koh Lanta, Krabi , deploying a multi-agency team to investigate foreign-owned operations disguised as local companies. On March 26 and 27, investigators from the department were joined by the Department of Tourism, Krabi’s Tourism and Sports Office, the Tourist Police Bureau, Immigration Bureau, and Krabi’s Commerce Office. The team targeted high-risk sectors including hotels, travel agencies, diving b

items.title: Chinese expat faces uncertainty over visa rules in Thailand
items.desc: Chinese expat faces uncertainty over visa rules in Thailand Legacy A 34 year old Chinese national living in Pattaya is facing an uncertain future in Thailand after his visa application was rejected and the country weighs tighter entry rules for long-term foreign residents. Cui Heng arrived in Thailand in July 2023 on a tourist visa, initially exploring whether the country could become a long-term home rather than a temporary escape. After settling in Pattaya, he applied for an education (ED) visa to gain stability, which was granted from March 2024 to March 2026, allowing him to train in Muay

items.title: 烟霾笼城！清迈空气污染冲上世界第一
items.desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 据泰媒报道，3月28日，泰国清迈遭遇严重空气污染，空气质量指数一度飙升至235，被全球空气质量监测网站IQAir列为当日全球空气污染最严重的城市首位。 根据泰国防灾减灾厅发布的预警，当日清迈空气中颗粒物浓度已达到第3级（黄色）警戒水平，开始对健康产生影响，尤其对脆弱人群和高风险群体影响更为明显。IQAir网站3月28日10时监测数据显示，清迈空气质量指数（US AQI）一度达到235，位列全球第一。随后污染水平在全天基本维持高位，直到16时才回落至122（全球第4位），但整体空气质量仍处于对公众健康产生影响的水平。 实地观察发现，此次污染已对清迈市区能见度造成严重影响。浓重烟霾笼罩整座城市，周边群山轮廓几乎无法辨认，天空呈现灰白浑浊状态，阳光被明显削弱，整体光线较平时显著昏暗。当地政府和相关部门已发布健康提醒，建议民众减少户外活动，特别是老人、儿童及呼吸系统疾病患者需加强防护。 （编译：Juliette；审校：WAN；来源：the standard） The post 烟霾笼城！清迈空气污染冲上世界第一 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .

items.title: 中国旅游夯爆了！泰国赴华游客暴增超130%，上海迪士尼成首选
items.desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 3月29日，据泰媒报道，全球旅游预订平台Klook发布报告显示，2026年泰国游客出行趋势持续增长，亚洲地区旅游市场明显回暖。其中，中国内地成为增长最突出的目的地，赴华游客数量同比增幅达131.5%；中国香港增长29.6%，日本增长28.8%，新加坡增长14.4%，泰国国内旅游增长15.6%。这些数据反映出短途出行的快速恢复，以及亚洲目的地的持续受欢迎程度。 与此同时，游客出行方式也发生明显变化，从过去“到此一游”转向“深度体验”。各类沉浸式、体验型活动持续走热，其中上海迪士尼相关预订增长48%，香港迪士尼增长24%，日本环球影城增长16%。 在配套服务方面，提升出行便利性的产品需求也大幅增长。租车服务增长29.7%，eSIM增长170.2%，酒店类产品增长高达172.5%，反映出游客越来越倾向于通过同一平台完成一站式旅行规划。 Klook全球市场副总裁表示，这些增长数据说明，泰国游客已不再将旅行仅仅视为休闲方式，而是看作一种“暂停与重启”。在快节奏的生活中，走进陌生城市、接触不同文化、体验全新事物，有助于人们重新审视自我、恢复能量，并以更充沛的状态回归日常生活。 （编译：Juliette；审校：WAN；来源：prachachat） The post 中国旅游夯爆了！泰国赴华游客暴增超130%，上海迪士尼成首选 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .

items.title: 泰国拟收紧免签政策：60天变30天，剑指电诈与非法滞留
items.desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 3月29日，据泰媒报道，泰国外交部拟向新一届内阁提交提案，将外国游客免签停留期限从60天缩短至30天，旨在堵住政策漏洞，防范电信诈骗、非法入境及潜在安全风险。这一调整预计将在近期内阁会议上进行审议。 外交部下属签证审议委员会认为，60天的免签期限过长，已成为不法分子利用的漏洞，包括以不符合签证类型的方式在泰国长期居留，以及非法从事工作等行为。根据以往情况，一般游客停留30天已基本足够，因此拟建议缩短免签期限，但仍允许游客申请延长停留30天。 外交部长西哈萨表示，这一措施并非针对任何特定国家或国籍，而是为了应对包括网络诈骗团伙在内的不法行为。一些相关人员利用长期免签政策进入泰国，并转往周边国家从事与旅游目的不符的活动。他强调，泰国仍高度重视接待外国游客，但同时也必须维护国家安全，防止不法分子以旅游名义入境，从事危害国家安全或不符合旅游目的的活动。 此次政策调整的背景，与当前国际局势变化密切相关。中东地区冲突已进入第4周，全球面临能源短缺带来的经济冲击，安全风险也随之上升。伊朗军方高级发言人曾向相关国家发出警告，称全球范围内的度假村、旅游景点和休闲场所已不再是安全区域。尽管泰国一贯奉行与各国友好、不与任何国家为敌的政策，但由于其重要旅游目的地属性，安全部门已加快提升防范等级。 安全部门指出，免签政策实施以来已暴露出多方面问题，例如难以核查部分外国游客背景、无法掌握其固

items.title: 上百名多国民众围堵美国驻清迈领馆，呼吁停止战争！
items.desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 据泰媒报道，3月28日，约百名居住在清迈的美国人、泰国人及来自多个国家的外籍人士聚集在美国驻清迈总领事馆前，举行和平集会，呼吁停止当前美国与伊朗之间的军事冲突。此次集会由自称“CNX4PEACE”的团体组织，过程平稳有序，参与者通过举牌、集体发声等方式表达诉求，并由代表宣读声明。 声明中要求美国政府停止不当使用权力，回归美国长期坚持的民主原则。声明指出，当前军事行动缺乏法律正当性，未获得国会授权，未充分评估全球影响，也未向公众作出清晰解释或设定明确目标。示威者认为，这种行为正在削弱美国作为民主国家的国际形象，并对全球范围内的民众生活产生直接影响。 示威者表示，当前冲突持续时间延长，已对油价和全球经济产生冲击，将进一步加重全球数亿民众的生活负担，其中也包括与美国长期保持友好关系的泰国。他们对美国当前政策方向表示遗憾，并呼吁美国政府停止以武力手段为主导的政策，转而重视和平谈判与外交解决方式。 此外，示威者还呼吁各国政府共同推动和平与共识，确保所有人的人权得到真正尊重。组织方表示，当天类似的和平集会在全球超过3000个地点同步举行，以表达对和平的共同诉求。 集会期间，当地警方及行政部门人员全程维持秩序，活动结束后参与者自行散去。与此同时，美国驻清迈总领事馆也通过多个平台向在泰美国公民发布安全提醒，建议其在当前局势下提高警惕，注意日常生活中的潜在风险，并遵循相关安全指引。
